examples: The Tides Inn is both comfortable and unpretentious.
She managed to impart great elegance to the unpretentious dress she was wearing.
Even Tommasini, who had advocated Gilbert's appointment in the Times, calls him "an unpretentious musician with no air of the formidable conductor about him".
John Tiffany has staged "Once" with appropriate simplicity on an unpretentious set designed by Bob Crowley.
The aim is clearly to create a typical family-style place serving unpretentious Italian fare.
